title: vulpia membranacea subsp. longiseta
intro: Vulpia membranacea subsp. longiseta, also known as hairy fleabane, is a perennial herb in the grass family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Its medicinal properties make it useful in treating various health issues, particularly due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of hairy fleabane include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
